name: Indonesian Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 Serrano chile peppers - seeded and minced
18 Fresh asparagus spears - cut into 1-inch pieces
1/2 Medium-size red bell pepper - cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients in a small saucepan and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
2. Remove from heat and keep warm.
3. In a nonstick skillet coated with vegetable cooking spray, saute the asparagus and bell pepper for 3 minutes or until tender.
4. Add green onions and continue sauteing until tender.
5. Toss with cooked pasta and peanut butter sauce.
6. Serve warm.
7. Garnish, if desired, with blanched fresh asparagus spears.
